title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
